ARIA — Regulatory Intelligence Assistant

ARIA LLM Configuration

Configure external LLM advisors to enable AI-powered answers. Default mode is Auto (Gemini + local fallback). Without API keys, ARIA uses her built-in knowledge base (works offline).

Prototype Notice: API keys stored in browser localStorage only. In production, keys are managed server-side with encryption. ARIA answers are reGulis-generated inputs — never compliance determinations.
Google Gemini (Recommended Primary)

Anthropic Claude (via Proxy)
